programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 226: Worlds Are Next: Final Rankings & Stevie Award Predictions With the ACL World Championships just around the corner, this week on Around The ACL, Jake, Meesh, and Anthony break down the final Singles rankings and discuss who has positioned themselves as the player to beat heading into the biggest event of the season. From Logan Chamberlain and Colin Hodet to Mark Richards, Zack Aiken, and Gabriel Clauson, the crew debates who has the momentum and who still has something to prove. The show also takes a look at the Pro Invitational teams and what fans should be watching as the sport's top players prepare to battle for a World Championship. To close out the episode, the hosts cast their ballots for the Around The ACL Stevie Awards. They debate the fan-nominated finalists for Game of the Year, Shot of the Year, Breakout Player, Rookie of the Year, and MVP while revisiting some of the biggest moments and performances from an unforgettable ACL season. Join us as we celebrate the season that was and look ahead to the biggest week in cornhole.

programme.title: Toque 12

programme.title: Red Ryder: Roll, Thunder, Roll!
programme.desc: Red Ryder finds two silver conchas, the trademark of bandit El Conejo, at a raided ranch. He reports the raid to Marshal Bill Faugh but tells him that he suspects that El Conejo, a Robin Hood type character, is being framed.

programme.title: PBR Team Series Draft
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 7 Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: After a Native American man and his wife are ostracized by their tribes and attempt to build a life as farmers on the Ponderosa, a bigoted neighbor’s violent act of revenge triggers a dangerous cycle of vengeance that tests Ben Cartwright’s faith

programme.title: The Wagon Train S2E16 The Hunter Malloy Story
programme.desc: After Hunter Malloy kills a man in self-defense, he flees to the wagon train to escape a vengeful sheriff. As the lawman closes in, Malloy must decide whether to continue running or stand his ground and face the consequences of his actions.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 11 The Trail Gang
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright hires a young drifter named "Sam Jackson" to work as a drover on a cattle drive. Unbeknownst to the Cartwrights, Jackson is actually an outlaw named Johnny Logan. Logan joined the drive specifically because he knew the route would pass near the town of Waycross, where he intends to kill the local sheriff—who is, in fact, his own father

programme.title: The Belle Starr Story (1968)
programme.desc: A fictionalized account of the legendary outlaw, depicting her transformation from a defiant woman into a notorious gunslinger who leads a gang of bandits in the post-Civil War West

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 8 The Abduction
programme.desc: When Joe Cartwright is kidnapped by a desperate gang of outlaws using him as leverage to secure a pardon for their leader, the rest of the Cartwright family must navigate a dangerous rescue mission to save him before his captors carry out their deadly ultimatum

programme.title: Cowboy G-Men - Chinaman's Chance
programme.desc: Cowboy Classics

programme.title: Raiders of Old California
programme.desc: At the end of the Mexican-American War, a crooked U.S. Cavalry Captain and his men force a captive Mexican officer to sign the deeds to his vast lands and large hacienda over to the Captain

programme.title: Romance on the Range 1942
programme.desc: Roy Rogers brings song and spirit to Romance on the Range! When cattle rustlers stir up trouble on the frontier, Roy saddles up to protect the ranchers and bring the outlaws to justice. Along the way, his courage and charm win more than just gunfights, as romance blossoms under the wide-open skies. With the Sons of the Pioneers providing harmony and plenty of action on the trail, this Western blends music, adventure, and heart in true Roy Rogers style.

programme.title: Without Honors (1932) Colorized
programme.desc: “In Without Honors, cowboy star Richard Arlen rides into a frontier tangled in treachery and deceit. Framed for a crime he didn’t commit, he must fight to clear his name and expose the outlaws behind the scheme. With tense drama, blazing action, and a touch of romance, this early Western delivers a rugged tale of courage and justice won the hard way.

programme.title: Idaho
programme.desc: A deputy sets out to prove that a respected judge, who had once been a criminal, is being framed for crimes committed by a crooked saloon owner.
